examples: When I've failed abjectly, I may think, 'Ooh, now the roller coaster is going down.
His condition became so abjectly miserable that even his Cousins were ashamed to own him.
In the cold winter night, you went further and further, and I was deeply pissed and crying abjectly.
But the notions espoused in this question are really abjectly ridiculous and, I felt, deserved a response in kind.
Before long, his Administration was abjectly backtracking on its bravado.
